headline: How The Ardagh Metal Packaging (AMBP) Narrative Is Shifting As Analyst Targets Diverge
summary: The fair value estimate for Ardagh Metal Packaging has shifted slightly from US$4.86 to US$4.92 per share, a small move that still matters if you are tracking where analysts think the stock could reasonably trade. Around that, Street price targets now cluster in a roughly US$3.60 to US$6 range, reflecting a split between those focused on balance sheet and volume risks and others who see improving execution and demand for beverage cans supporting higher levels. As you read on, you will see how...
